code_value:
W: Hi, Tom. Where did you go last weekend?

M: I went to Foshan with my family.

W: That's great! What did you see there?

M: We visited the Ancestral Temple and watched a lion dance performance.

W: Sounds interesting! Did you take any photos?

M: Yes, I took many beautiful photos there.

ets_th1 Where did Tom go last weekend?
(To Foshan. / To Guangzhou. / To Shenzhen.)
ets_th2 What did Tom watch there?
(A lion dance. / A dragon dance. / A snake dance.)
